name: @borjie/litfin-port-security-extra
description: LITFIN-ported security + governance patterns: webhook-signature verifiers (Stripe/M-Pesa/GePG/Twilio), signed-event-emit primitive, per-domain constitutional rules, per-jurisdiction GDPR-equivalent helpers (POPIA SAR), anti-fraud heuristics (velocity + geo-anomaly). Pure functions, deterministic.
